street.description: Street the truck restriction applies to

locality.description: Village qualifier when given (e.g. 'West Newton', 'Newtonville', 'Newton Centre')

weight_limit_tons.description: Carrying-capacity threshold in tons above which commercial vehicles are restricted (e.g. 5, 2.5); empty if unstated

from_point.description: Start of the restricted segment; empty if whole/unstated

times.description: Hours the restriction applies (e.g. '8:00 p.m. to 7:00 a.m.'); empty = all times

status.description: Whether the exclusion is in effect or still pending Commonwealth approval (the 'Note to Sec TPR-83' list)
